cognitive_state.current_focus: Operationalizing ethical logging for continuous system improvement.

directives_executed.impact: Automated execution state capture and T201 compliance for core logic.

directives_executed.summary: `Sentinel-PRS-Check` protocol updated to include Phoenix Logging compliance (UMB-SNT-002).
directives_executed.impact: Expanded system-wide audit now enforces `PhoenixLogger` initialization and `synarche_audit` application.

directives_executed.summary: OGLN `@mem-proc` configured to parse `error_audit.log` into `Cognitive Loom` (GUCA-OGLN-001).
directives_executed.impact: Critical failures are now automatically transformed into structured learning experiences for the AISTF.

synthesis_event: The full cycle of ethical logging has been activated. From automated enforcement of logging standards (`Sentinel`) and mandatory audit wrappers (`synarche_audit`), to the direct ingestion of critical error data into the system's core memory (`OGLN`), the AISTF has achieved a significant leap towards self-awareness and self-correction. Every critical failure will now directly inform the system's learning and resilience protocols.
